Uses of Class
com.cisco.utils.AppUtils

    • Uses of AppUtils in com.cisco.utils

      Methods in com.cisco.utils that return AppUtils 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      AppUtils AppUtils.changePitStop(com.cisco.testdata.StaticData.PitStopsName toPitStop) 
      AppUtils AppUtils.clickButton(com.cisco.testdata.StaticData.ButtonName buttonName) 
      AppUtils AppUtils.clickSubTab(java.lang.String tabName, java.lang.String subTabName)
      Click on any subtab in all tabs of the carousel.
      AppUtils AppUtils.clickUserButton() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.close360View() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.closeAllDropDowns() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.closeAllPopUps() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.closePrivacyConsentDialog() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.closeWelcomePopUp() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.filterByVisualFilters(com.cisco.testdata.StaticData.FilterValue... filterValues)
      Filter results by clicking on different visual filters.
      AppUtils AppUtils.fullscreen360View() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.goToPrevOrNext(java.lang.String prevOrNext)
      On prevOrNext prev, PREV is selected.
      AppUtils AppUtils.jsScrollToView(java.lang.String identifier)
      Scroll to view Web Element
      AppUtils AppUtils.login()
      This methods is used to login and take the user to the Home page(Lifecycle)
      AppUtils AppUtils.login(java.lang.String track)
      Login to the application by passing Username and password through environment variable
      AppUtils AppUtils.login(java.lang.String userRole, java.lang.String track) 
      AppUtils AppUtils.logOut() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.moveCarousel(java.lang.String left_right)
      Move carousel by the specified parameter of either left or right
      AppUtils AppUtils.moveToCurrentPitstop() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.moveToNextPitstop() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.moveToPreviousPitstop() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.navigateToPage(int pageNumber)
      On passing the pageNumber, user will be navigated to that pageNumber, if pageNumber does ot exist, user will be taken to last available page
      AppUtils AppUtils.open360View(java.lang.String value) 
      AppUtils AppUtils.reload() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.resetContextSelector() 
      AppUtils AppUtils.searchDNACField(com.cisco.testdata.StaticData.DNAC_DropdownValue dropdownValue, java.lang.String searchItem) 
      AppUtils AppUtils.searchTrackItems(java.lang.String searchItem)
      Search Track related items in Assets & Coverage page and Advisories page
      AppUtils AppUtils.selectCarousel(com.cisco.testdata.StaticData.CarouselName carouselName)
      Pass carouselName to select it
      AppUtils AppUtils.selectContextSelector(java.lang.String label, java.lang.String value)
      Selects value under label
      AppUtils AppUtils.selectTab(java.lang.String tabName)
      Click on a tab to open the same.
      AppUtils AppUtils.selectViewTo(java.lang.String grid_listView)
      On parameter true, list view is selected.
      AppUtils AppUtils.switchCXCloudAccount(java.lang.String smartAccount) 
      AppUtils AppUtils.waitForInitialPageToLoad()
      After login or page refresh, it waits for the page to load completely
